root_cause: Out of memory during prefill warmup for 131072 token sequence: attempted to allocate 1140850688 B DRAM buffer across 12 banks (95071616 B per bank) but only 187700320 B free with largest block 94678624 B. The max_prefill_chunk_size=131072 is too large for available DRAM.
error_message: Out of Memory: Not enough space to allocate 1140850688 B DRAM buffer across 12 banks, where each bank needs to store 95071616 B, but bank size is 1021821792 B (allocated: 834121472 B, free: 187700320 B, largest free block: 94678624 B)
suggested_action: Reduce max_prefill_chunk_size to 65536 or lower via override_tt_config in vLLM configuration to fit within available DRAM budget.
